name: EclFresnelTW
comment: EclFresnel TW is an advanced LED replacement of traditional 1.000 W Fresnel lamps. Offering 6 colour mixing, delivering high precision reproduction of the white spectrum from 2.800 K to 10.000 K with high CRI and an extensive colour reproduction.

gwSpecs.description: EclFresnel TW is an advanced LED replacement of traditional 1.000 W Fresnel lamps. Offering 6 colour mixing, delivering high precision reproduction of the white spectrum from 2.800 K to 10.000 K with high CRI and an extensive colour reproduction.
